meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Ship Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your MVP. Use this expert checklist to master AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your SaaS faster.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is 'debugging paralysis.' By integrating Claude Code for CLI-based iteration and Antigravity for structural analysis, you transform roadblocks into automated tasks. This workflow minimizes context switching, keeps your velocity high, and ensures your MVP moves from prototype to production-ready revenue generator consistently.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is littered with half-baked MVPs. You know the feeling: you’re three weeks deep, the feature set is expanding, and suddenly a cryptic error stack trace halts your progress. You spend six hours hunting a missing semicolon while your competitor gains ground. It isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of leverage.

True founders don't debug manually—they architect solutions. By leveraging AI as your lead engineer, you stop being the bottleneck. We’re moving beyond simple chatbot prompts to a rigorous, CLI-driven engineering workflow that treats your codebase as a living, breathing asset.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure State
steps.description: Before fixing, you must define the precise failure. Use AI to write a failing test case so you know exactly when the bug is resolved.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase and generate a minimal reproduction test case that isolates the current production error.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create a unit test that replicates the current crash'

steps.title: Architectural Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Don't just fix the line; fix the pattern. Use AI to identify if the bug stems from a design flaw in your state management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current logic for this module. Identify architectural bottlenecks causing this recurrence.

steps.title: Automated Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the fix across the entire repository to ensure the bug doesn't migrate to other modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the fix for the identified bug across all related service files while maintaining existing API contracts.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file ./services/ --task 'Refactor to fix the state synchronization error'

steps.title: Regression Testing
steps.description: Verify that your fix didn't break secondary features. Run your full suite through the AI to validate stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the recent changes. Predict potential side effects on the payment gateway and generate a regression test suite.

steps.title: Deployment Readiness
steps.description: Final sanity check before pushing to production to ensure performance metrics remain within thresholds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a final code review focusing on production safety, error handling, and performance impact.

pro_tips: Always commit your state before running AI edits so you can roll back instantly with git.
Use 'Explain' mode in Claude Code to force the AI to document the 'why' behind a complex fix.
Treat your error logs as the primary source of truth; feed them directly into the AI context.
If the AI struggles, break the problem into smaller functions; AI models perform better with modular code.
Maintain a 'knowledge-base.md' in your root directory to keep the AI updated on your business logic.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is stable, implement an automated CI/CD pipeline that runs your Claude Code test suite on every commit to ensure you never manually debug again.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your launch date. Master the AI-first development stack and reclaim your time as a founder. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
